default_timezone.description: Default timezone for booking schedule display

max_advance_booking_days.description: Maximum number of days in advance a user can book

min_lead_time_hours.description: Minimum hours before a slot starts that booking is allowed

cancellation_grace_period_hours.description: Hours before booking start when free cancellation is allowed

default_confirmation_mode.description: Default booking confirmation mode: auto (instant) or manual (admin approval)

default_slot_duration_minutes.description: Default slot duration in minutes for new resources

default_buffer_minutes.description: Default buffer time between slots in minutes

invoice_prefix.description: Prefix for booking invoice numbers (e.g., BK-a1b2c3d4)

enable_recurring_bookings.description: Allow users to create recurring bookings

max_bookings_per_user_per_day.description: Maximum bookings a single user can make per day

capture_mode.description: Payment capture mode: auto (charge immediately) or manual (authorize only, charge later)
